text: The woman felt as though the woman were balancing on a knife's edge, poised between revelation and oblivion. In the final moments of the play, as the actors took their bows to thunderous applause, a realization struck the woman with the force of a physical blow. The entire performance had been a carefully orchestrated ruse, a smokescreen for something far more sinister.
context: This chunk describes the climax of the play, where the woman realizes the performance was a deceptive facade.
